name: stainedmotion
description: Generative stained-glass and Art Nouveau animated wallpapers for Wallpaper Engine and the web.

scripts.test: node build.mjs && node test/motion.test.mjs && node test/smoke.test.mjs stained-glass && node test/smoke.test.mjs art-nouveau-sparse && node test/smoke.test.mjs art-nouveau-organic && node test/smoke.test.mjs heartwood && node test/smoke.test.mjs heartwood-simple
